main.tlua(7,22): error TLUA2339: Property 'nope' does not exist on type '{ clamp(n: number, lo: number, hi: number): number; name: string; }'.


==== main.tlua (1 errors) ====
    // A chunk's top-level return is its module value; require reports it.
    local util = require("util");
    local n = util.clamp(5, 1, 3);
    local s: string = util.name;
    
    // The extension is implicit, as in Lua's module names.
    local missing = util.nope;
                         ~~~~
!!! error TLUA2339: Property 'nope' does not exist on type '{ clamp(n: number, lo: number, hi: number): number; name: string; }'.
    
==== util.tlua (0 errors) ====
    local M = {};
    
    function M.clamp(n: number, lo: number, hi: number): number
      if n < lo then return lo end
      if n > hi then return hi end
      return n;
    end
    
    M.name = "util";
    
    return M;
